case_title: PLOUVIEZ, PAUL et al VS ALLSTATE INSURANCE - VESTAL, SANDRA

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,010.76 FILED BY PLOUVIEZ, PAUL SHIMADA, SHIZUKO AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE -  VESTAL, SANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
